overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic waterfront promenade beneath an elevated highway. The character passes through semi-covered walkways with palm trees and neon-lit buildings, emerging into sunlight to approach a crosswalk dominated by a large 'El Guapo' digital billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing palm trees

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead casting shadows on the walkway
tall palm tree trunk with fronds visible against the sky
body of water running parallel to the walkway on the right side
low concrete barrier separating walkway from the water
futuristic buildings with glowing neon signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered waterfront promenade beneath a massive elevated highway. Palm trees line the path while futuristic buildings with neon signs rise on the left. The area is sheltered from direct sunlight, creating diffused lighting conditions.

events.description: exits the shadow of the overpass into bright direct sunlight
approaching intersection with large digital billboard becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the environment opens up to direct sunlight

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying 'El Guapo' advertisement with neon graphics
painted zebra stripes on the road surface indicating pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into bright sunlight, transitioning from sheltered to exposed environment. The large 'El Guapo' digital billboard becomes visible ahead as the character approaches a crosswalk intersection.

events.description: waiting at crosswalk as vehicles pass on the right
beginning to cross the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the street alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: crossing the street in the same direction as ego
black car stopped at the crosswalk waiting for pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the crosswalk and waits for traffic before crossing the street. The 'El Guapo' billboard now dominates the left side of the frame at close range. Other pedestrians cross alongside, and a black car waits at the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic waterfront promenade that transitions from a sheltered urban underpass into a bright, open city intersection. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, where the character walks past palm trees and neon-lit buildings under diffused, shadowed lighting. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the cover of the overpass into brilliant sunlight, exposing the wide street ahead. The camera then approaches a crosswalk where a towering El Guapo digital billboard emerges to dominate the frame. Finally, the movement slows as the character waits alongside other pedestrians and a black car before crossing the street beneath the glow of the massive advertisement.
